## Reviewer Checklist
- [ ] PR is scoped to one main purpose
- [ ] Description is complete and clear
- [ ] Tests/validation evidence is included
- [ ] Schema/env changes are documented (if any)
- [ ] Screenshots/GIFs included for UI changes (if any)
